sisyphus.prompt_append: You are working on StudyPodLM - an AI-powered personal study assistant. The project uses React 18, TypeScript 5, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS 3.4, Radix UI components, and Zustand for state management. Key features include multi-format content extraction (PDF, websites, YouTube), AI-powered study tools (flashcards, quizzes, summaries), and podcast generation with Kokoro TTS.

librarian.prompt_append: When answering questions about this codebase, focus on: src/components/notebook/ for notebook features, src/lib/tts/ for audio generation, and src/stores/ for state management. Use src/lib/extraction/ for content extraction logic.

frontend-ui-ux-engineer.prompt_append: Use Radix UI components from @/components/ui/. Follow the existing component patterns in src/components/notebook/. Use Tailwind CSS for styling with the project's color scheme.
